understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle by placing every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously within each level's step budget, achieving WIN for the entire run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P), potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) but blocked by walls (#); CLICK switches selection to another selectable (S) at exact pixel coordinates like [x,y]; multiple pieces require precise positioning on all + goals at once; grid is 3 pixels/cell with hints like movement_blocked.
